CheckTitle: Okta password policies require at least 15 characters
Description: Every active Okta Password Policy should enforce minimum password length of at least 15 characters.
Risk: Weak or inconsistent password policy settings increase credential guessing, reuse, and account takeover risk for users governed by less strict policies.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: Update every active Okta Password Policy to enforce minimum password length of at least 15 characters.
